_comment: Auto-update manifest consumed by tauri-plugin-updater. Updated alongside each tagged release. The signature field carries a minisign signature of the corresponding installer; the matching public key is baked into apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json under plugins.updater.pubkey.
notes: Mycelium v0.75.0-beta.1 — 65 betas of accumulated work since v0.10.0. Highlights: per-note encryption (v0.66), encrypted-note lock glyph (v0.74), pinned-section split (v0.71), back/forward navigation (v0.57), board / calendar / tasks views, snapshot diff, smart paste, drop-to-create, custom keyboard shortcuts, draft restore, properties form, rename rewrites wiki-links, LaTeX expansion (v0.72), workspace overview palette command (v0.73). v0.75 itself adds: sync policy scaffold (Settings → Sync; transport M1-pending), UI remake Phase 1 (spacing tokens, z-index audit, overlap fixes), 4 new themes (Solarized Dark/Light, Dracula, Nord), and a 'Saved X ago' editor footer indicator. See https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/releases/tag/v0.75.0-beta.1 for the full per-version detail in CHANGELOG.md.
